story: The weekly operations meeting covered facility maintenance schedules. The janitorial contract was renewed for another year with the same vendor. A plan was created for replacing the HVAC filters every ninety days. The maintenance log was reviewed and all scheduled preventative work for the previous month was completed. A monthly inventory of supplies was taken and reorder thresholds were adjusted. The facilities manager submitted the budget for repair and maintenance. The meeting concluded with a site walkthrough to inspect recent repairs. No outstanding issues were identified. All staff received the updated emergency contact list.
